Video.summary: Laura proves herself more proficient than Rob in the art of self-defense.
Video.title: My Mother Can Beat Up My Father

Image.alt: My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father
My Mother Can Beat Up My Father

Video.summary: Rob and Laura are unaware that their teenage babysitter has a crush on Laura.
Video.title: The Lady and the Baby Sitter

Image.alt: The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter
The Lady and the Baby Sitter

Video.summary: Rob's friendship with Jerry is almost destroyed in a feud over a neighbor's crabgrass.
Video.title: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat

Image.alt: A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat
A Vigilante Ripped My Sports Coat

Video.summary: Sally Rogers is romanced by her "secret" admirer -- the owner of Monker's Delicatessen.
Video.title: Romance, Roses and Rye Bread

Video.summary: Rob and Laura are on their way to visit the doctor when they are trapped in a stalled elevator.
Rob puts his job at risk when he convinces Alan Brady to host a cultural documentary program.
Video.title: Three Letters from One Wife

Video.summary: Laura takes two of Millie's prescription pills and suffers disastrous side effects.
Video.title: Pink Pills and Purple Parents

Video.summary: Rob struggles to hide his flu symptoms at a family party rather.
Video.title: The Death of the Party

Video.summary: Rob is once again forced to thwart another scheme of his old but manipulative friend, Neil Schenk.
Video.title: Stretch Petrie vs. Kid Schenk

Video.summary: Rob receives a ransom demand of $2,500 for his lost television script.
Video.title: Brother, Can You Spare $2500?

Video.summary: Rob's younger brother involves Sally Rogers in a romantic Waterloo.
Video.title: Stacey Petrie: Part I

Video.summary: Rob, Laura, Sally and Buddy spend a frightening night in a haunted cabin at a mountain resort.
Video.title: The Ghost of A. Chantz

Video.summary: The "Alan Brady" writers entertain at a prison and Rob gets locked up with the inmates.
Video.title: The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail

Image.alt: The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail
The Alan Brady Show Goes To Jail

Video.summary: Rob, Sally and Buddy go on big ego trips when a national magazine wants to do a story about them.
Video.title: My Two Showoffs and Me

Video.summary: Jacques Savon, who has played a curious part in both Rob's and Laura's pasts, suddenly reappears.
Video.title: The Square Triangle

Video.summary: Rob finds himself very out of place at a dinner party for celebrated literati.
Video.title: I'm No Henry Walden

Video.summary: A romantic British film star (Richard Dawson) arouses Rob's ire by his attentions to Laura.
Video.title: Racy Tracy Rattigan

Video.summary: Laura's old flame re-enters the Petries' lives as Alan Brady's newest sponsor.
Video.title: It's a Shame She Married Me

Image.alt: It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me
It's a Shame She Married Me

Video.summary: Laura despairs when Rob learns of her elaborate plans to throw a surprise party for him.
Video.title: A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise

Image.alt: A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise
A Surprise Surprise Is a Surprise

Video.summary: Rob finds himself in hot water after inadvertently lifting a comedy idea from another show.
Video.title: When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen

Image.alt: When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen
When a Bowling Pin Talks, Listen

Video.summary: Rob bids on and wins an ugly clown painting that covers another work beneath, perhaps a masterpiece.
Video.title: The Masterpiece

Video.summary: Rob would like to know why Laura disappears every time his insurance agent comes over or calls.
Video.title: Laura's Little Lie

Video.summary: Rob and Laura unintentionally eavesdrop on the Helpers prior to attending their dinner party.
Video.title: All About Eavesdropping

Video.summary: Rob finds himself trapped between casting Laura as this year's leading woman or a talented newcomer.
Video.title: Too Many Stars

Video.summary: Rob finds himself at a party in a strange town, dancing with a young woman.
Video.title: Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?

Image.alt: Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?
Who and Where Was Antonio Stradivarius?

Video.summary: Rob's energetic Uncle George comes for a visit to eagerly pressure Rob into finding him a wife.
Video.title: Uncle George

Video.summary: Rob feels very much the hero when he hires a maid for his overworked wife, Laura.
Video.title: Turtles, Ties, and Toreadors

Video.summary: Rob struggles between his civic duty and fear for his family's safety.
Video.title: The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...

Image.alt: The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...
The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...
The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...
The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...

The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...
The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...
The Sound of the Trumpets of Conscience Falls Deafly on a Brain That Holds Its Ears...

Video.summary: The entire "Alan Brady" staff presents a Christmas show instead of the script.
Video.title: The Alan Brady Show Presents

Video.summary: When a handsome bachelor moves in next door, Rob and Laura become matchmakers.
Video.title: The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer

Image.alt: The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer
The Lady and the Tiger and the Lawyer

Video.summary: Rob is overwhelmed by jealousy when he meets one of Laura's old flames.
Video.title: The Life and Love of Joe Coogan

Image.alt: The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan
The Life and Love of Joe Coogan

Video.summary: A social game of poker turns sour when it's discovered Rob has been playing with a marked deck.
Video.title: A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards

Image.alt: A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards
A Nice, Friendly Game of Cards

Video.summary: Rob consults a psychiatrist to determine whether a series of mysterious ailments is psychosomatic.
Video.title: The Brave and the Backache

Video.summary: When Laura fills in for Sally at the office, her performance exceeds everyone's expectations.
Video.title: My Part-Time Wife

Video.summary: Rob recalls the hectic time of his Army marriage to Laura.
Video.title: Honeymoons Are for the Lucky

Video.summary: At the insistence of an overbearing guest star, Rob takes over as producer of The Alan Brady Show.
Video.title: How to Spank a Star

Video.summary: A scratch on Rob's new car causes a domestic crisis at the Petrie house.
Video.title: Scratch My Car and Die

Video.summary: A painting of Laura resurfaces -- but this time she is not wearing any clothes.
Video.title: October Eve

Video.summary: Rob goes to see an old Army buddy's nightclub act and winds up spending the night in jail.
Video.title: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

Image.alt: Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail
Dear Mrs. Petrie, Your Husband Is In Jail

Video.summary: Fearing he may be going bald, Rob tries a barber's secret recipe.
Video.title: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All

Image.alt: I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All
I'd Rather Be Bald Than Have No Head at All

Video.summary: Sally gets a marriage proposal from an opportunistic comedian who wants her to write his material.
Video.title: Jilting the Jilter

Video.summary: Rob and Laura, having learned they are not legally married, make plans to elope.
Video.title: Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice

Image.alt: Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice
Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice
Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice
Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice
Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice
Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice

Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice
Very Old Shoes, Very Old Rice

Video.summary: A man with suspected underworld connections asks Rob, Sally and Buddy to write a comedy routine.
Video.title: Big Max Calvada

Video.summary: A young chorus girl on The Alan Brady Show falls desperately in love with Rob.
Video.title: The Third One from the Left

Image.alt: The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left
The Third One from the Left

Video.summary: Laura and Rob give Ritchie a birthday party and 63 screaming moppets make a shambles of their house.
Video.title: Happy Birthday and Too Many More

Image.alt: Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More
Happy Birthday and Too Many More

Video.summary: Rob and Laura's parents compete to get the couple committed to their respective cemetery plots.
Video.title: The Plots Thicken

Video.summary: Rob and Laura suspect their neighbor Jerry is having an affair.
Video.title: My Neighbor's Husband's Other Life
